title: Makoto Miwa
text: Home * People * Makoto Miwa Makoto Miwa [1] Makoto Miwa , a Japanese computer scientist and associate professor at Toyota Technological Institute , previously affiliated with the University of Tokyo . His research interests include natural language processing , game learning , automated tuning and Upper Confidence bounds applied to Trees (UCT) .
